product: Databricks Apps support for compliance security profile standards
tagline: Databricks Apps now supports all compliance security profile standards supported by Databricks, such as HIPAA, PCI DSS, and FedRAMP Moderate.
what_it_does: Databricks Apps now supports all compliance security profile standards supported by Databricks, such as HIPAA, PCI DSS, and FedRAMP Moderate. For a full list of supported compliance standards, see Compliance security profile. This page describes the compliance security profile, its compliance controls, and supported features.
why_it_matters: Databricks Apps now supports all compliance security profile standards supported by Databricks, such as HIPAA, PCI DSS, and FedRAMP Moderate.
plain_summary: Databricks Apps now supports all compliance security profile standards supported by Databricks, such as HIPAA, PCI DSS, and FedRAMP Moderate. For a full list of supported compliance standards, see Compliance security profile.

capabilities.title: FIPS 140 validated encryption modules
